fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`HBColor` represents a HarfBuzz `hb_color_t` value — a 32-bit packed color with **BGRA** byte
ordering: `0xBBGGRRAA` (blue in the high byte, alpha in the low byte). This differs from
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKColor>, which uses ARGB ordering (`0xAARRGGBB`).

Use the named properties (<xref:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor.Red>, <xref:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor.Green>,
<xref:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor.Blue>, <xref:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor.Alpha>) to read individual
channels safely without needing to know the byte layout. Use the component constructor
`HBColor(byte red, byte green, byte blue, byte alpha)` to create a value from individual channels.

This type is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
// Create an opaque red color and read its components.
var red = new HBColor(255, 0, 0, 255);
Console.WriteLine($"R={red.Red} G={red.Green} B={red.Blue} A={red.Alpha}");

// Convert to and from a raw uint value.
uint packed = (uint)red;
var same = (HBColor)packed;
Console.WriteLine(same == red); // True
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Represents a HarfBuzz color value with BGRA byte ordering.
Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> struct from a packed BGRA value.

params.value: The packed color value in BGRA byte order (<c>0xBBGGRRAA</c>).

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> struct with the specified color channel values.

params.alpha: The alpha channel value (0–255), where 0 is fully transparent and 255 is fully opaque.

entries.signature: public HBColor (byte red, byte green, byte blue, byte alpha);

fields.value: The alpha component (0–255), where 0 is fully transparent and 255 is fully opaque.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the specified value is equal to the current instance; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> is equal to the current instance.

params.other: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the specified object is an <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> equal to the current instance; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> instance.

params.obj: The object to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: A hash code for the current instance.
fields.summary: Returns a hash code for the current <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the two values are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> values are equal.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor left, HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor right);

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> whose raw value equals <paramref name="value" />.
fields.summary: Explicitly converts a packed BGRA <see cref="T:System.UInt32" /> value to an <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" />.

params.value: The packed color value in BGRA byte order (<c>0xBBGGRRAA</c>).

entries.signature: public static explicit operator HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor (uint value);

fields.returns: The packed BGRA value of <paramref name="color" /> in <c>0xBBGGRRAA</c> byte order.
fields.summary: Implicitly converts an <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> to its packed BGRA <see cref="T:System.UInt32" /> value.

entries.signature: public static implicit operator uint (HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor color);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the two values are not equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> values are not equal.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor left, HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor right);

fields.returns: A string of the form <c>#AARRGGBB</c> where each pair of hex digits represents the alpha, red, green, and blue channel values respectively.
fields.summary: Returns the string representation of the color in <c>#AARRGGBB</c> hexadecimal format.

fields.value: The packed color value in <c>0xBBGGRRAA</c> byte order.
fields.summary: Gets the raw packed BGRA value.
